titleStmt.title: SII 25.141: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 141. (A.R. No. 141 of 1908.) TIRUPPATTŪR, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: West wall of the central shrine in the Sundararāja-perumāḷ temple.
This fragmentary inscription commences with the praśasti, Pūmalaṟtiruvum,* etc., of the king. The record may palaeographically be assigned to 13th century.

It records an order of the king issued to the sabhai of Rājachūḍāmanichaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya in Aḷa-nāḍu, to collect the taxes once levied from the village, at the instance of Tiruvuḍaiyār, a māmatti of the king from the 2nd year of his rule.

The document is stated to have been attested by Poduvakkuḍaiyāṉ Viḻupparaiyaṉ of Poduvakkuḍi in the eastern division of Miḻalaik-kūṟṟam, Āyaṉ Nilamaiyaḻagiyaperumāṉ alias Uttiramantri of Perumaṇaḷūr in Aṇḍanāḍu and Araiyaṉ Viradamuḍittāṉ alias Pallavarāyaṉ of Chakkarapāṇinallūr in Sevvirukkai-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmaṭaṟ tiruvum poruceyamaṭantaiyum tāṭiraikkuvimulai ceyapuyattiruppa vetanāvil veḷḷit taṭṭāmairaik kātal mātu kaviṉpeṟat tiḷaippa veṇṭirai yuṭutta maṇṭiṇi kiṭakkat tirunilamaṭantai yurimaiyiṟ kaḷippac camaiya nitiyun tarumamun taḻaippa Imaiyavar viḻākkoṭiyiṭantoṟu meṭuppa
k karuṅkali kaṉalkeṭak kaṭavuḷ vetiya raruntoḻil veḻvic ceṅkaṉal vaḷaṟpaccurutiyun tamiḻun tolvaḷaṅ kulavap porulāḻi pūtalañ cūḻa Orukai yiru cevi mummata kāṟkoṭṭa yirāpata mutal yiṭa viṭac civanta
ṅ kamalameṉṟaṇuku mulakamuḻutuṭaiyāroṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya yāṉa Aḷanāṭṭu brahmadeyam Irācacūṭāmaṇi caturvvedimaṅkalattu sabhaiyāṟku taṅkaḷur muṉpu kaṭamai Iṟuttup ponta malai
iraṇṭāvatu mutalirupattīraṭiyāṉ kāṇaviṉiya perumāṉeṉṉum ntu muṉpu Iṟuttuvanta kaṭamai Iṟukkappeṟaveṇumeṉṟu māmatti tiruvuṭaiyār namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil taṅkaḷur muṉpu kaṭamaiyuṅ kācum ṟu varuvatāka niṉai
coṉṉom . Ippaṭi cantrātittavaṟ celvatākak kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭuvittuk koḷkaveṉṟu miḻailaik kūṟṟattuk kiḻkūṟṟup potuvak kuṭip potuvak kuṭaiyāṉ Āraiyaṉ Āḷuṭaiyāṉāṉa teṉṉavaṉ viḻupparaiyaṉ Eḻuttu
yāṇṭu Iraṇṭāvatu nāḷ Irunūṟṟirupattoṉṟu Aṇṭa nāṭṭup perumaṇalūr Āyaṉ nilamaiyaḻakiya perumāṉāṉa Uttiramantiri Eḻuttu cevvirukkai nāṭṭuc cakkarapāṇi nallūr Araiyaṉ viratamuṭittāṉāṉa pallavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 25.141 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
